heroHeadline: Israel Tightens Restrictions on Palestinian Access to Ibrahimi Mosque in Hebron
heroSubtitle: Israeli authorities have imposed new restrictions on Palestinian worshippers at the Ibrahimi Mosque in Hebron, deepening control over the contested holy site. Gaza Phase 2 ceasefire negotiations remain frozen — 689 Palestinians killed since the October 2025 ceasefire, food prices up 305%, and 1.6 million Gazans face acute food insecurity.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
